entry: Hidden-Matrix first video (slug 10-glitches-...-50f3): factcheck PASSED after 2 revisions; final quality gate BLOCKED (un-approvable). CEO chose path B. Actions: (1) Flux soft-tier addendum authored on compose:motion_energy ↑ (continued motion through holds, kill static frames). (2) Filed CEO approval to apply a ~2-min mid-form profile to the FROZEN rubric — render:final_runtime / script:runtime_fit / narration:total_duration_fit → [105,150], compose:cut_rhythm → [1.5,18]; only length-encoding bands touched, no hard floors. Loudness (−22 vs −14±1 hard floor) to be fixed via final loudnorm on re-render. Next: on "profile applied", re-run line + re-gate for final sign-off. Note: read_repo jailed to atlas/, can't inspect studio project files directly.
